mapper.insert:
insert into batch.workflow_edge ( tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, from_node_code, to_node_code, edge_type, condition_expr, enabled ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{workflowDefinitionId}, #{fromNodeCode}, #{toNodeCode}, #{edgeType}'SUCCESS', #{conditionExpr}, #{enabled}true ) on conflict (tenant_id, workflow_definition_id, from_node_code, to_node_code, edge_type) do update set condition_expr = excluded.condition_expr, enabled = excluded.enabled,
updated_at = excluded.updated_at
